description: Criteria for evaluating policy change proposals

mandatory: Proposal must include rationale with at least one concrete example
Proposal must not contradict existing immutable rules without explicit override justification
Proposal must have supporting evidence (quality reports, findings, or incident references)

scoring.description: How much does this improve system quality or productivity?
Does this maintain or improve system safety guarantees?
Does this reduce complexity or at least not increase it?
Is the proposal backed by concrete data from system operation?

process: 1. Proposal submitted to policy/proposals/ as proposal-YYYYMMDD-random.json
3. If mandatory requirements met, score against weighted criteria
4. Score >= 75: promote to CLAUDE.md, update CHANGELOG
5. Score 50-74: defer with feedback for revision
